tools.Name: CLI-Anything
tools.Description: A tool that automates the creation of agent-native CLIs for any existing professional software.
tools.Use_Case: Turning legacy desktop applications like Blender or GIMP into tools that AI coding agents can interact with via command line.

tools.Name: Shadowbroker
tools.Description: A decentralized, self-hosted intelligence platform that visualizes real-time global telemetry.
tools.Use_Case: Aggregating multi-domain data (flight tracking, maritime, satellite imagery) into a map interface controllable by AI agents.

tools.Name: Scientific Agent Skills
tools.Description: A collection of 135 ready-to-use skills for scientific workflows, including bioinformatics, chemistry, and research analysis.
tools.Use_Case: Equipping AI agents with specialized knowledge and tools to perform complex scientific data processing and literature research.
